title: Rational series in the free group and the Connes operator
journal: Noncommutative birational geometry, representations and combinatorics, pp. 177-197, Contemp. Math., v. 592, Amer. Math. Soc., Providence, RI, 2013
journal_ref: Noncommutative birational geometry, representations and combinatorics, pp. 177-197, Contemp. Math., v. 592, Amer. Math. Soc., Providence, RI, 2013
abstract: We characterize rational series over the free group by using an operator introduced by A. Connes. We prove that rational Malcev--Neumann series posses rational expressions without simplifications. Finally, we develop an effective algorithm for solving the word problem in the free skew field.
